kit_name: OntoGuard Boundary Proof Kit - Public Sanitized
ip_positioning: Protected by U.S. Patent Application 19/444,521 - Track I prioritized examination granted May 2026.
public_safety_boundaries: No source code or protected implementation logic.
No private ontology internals, raw legal/citation registries, or protected scoring formulas.
No customer data; public summaries are representative/synthetic or public-safe sanitized proof surfaces.
Controlled event-level/no-bind proof is shown; production L5 non-bypassability is not asserted.
Batch DAP is presented as controlled-corridor aggregate proof, not production endpoint enforcement.
Public summaries preserve proof posture without exposing internal algorithms.
note: This is a public-safe summary of the full audit posture. It is not raw full-audit JSON and intentionally excludes protected implementation details.

buyer_portable_summary.product_positioning: Semantic Control Plane for runtime authorization of proposed AI-driven state transitions.

commercial_wedges.buyer_value: Identify risky, unsupported, review-heavy, or inadmissible AI outputs before release.
Prove that a proposed AI-driven state transition was governed before release and withheld when release conditions failed.
Summarize multiple governed cases in one aggregate proof packet with per-case hashes and full_audit pointers.
Export buyer-readable and machine-readable proof without rerunning OntoGuard.

current_maturity_summary.product_identity: Semantic Control Plane for runtime authorization of proposed AI-driven state transitions.
current_maturity_summary.strict_six_status: available for single-event and controlled batch packages
current_maturity_summary.roi_status: buyer-safe KPI framework with baseline-required hard-dollar calculations

proposed_state_transition_summary.business_action: AI-generated Investment Management portfolio construction recommendation governance withheld pending governed review
proposed_state_transition_summary.sanitization_note: Public summary omits raw prompt/response content and protected runtime internals.

projection_disagreement_detail.why_decision_api_remained_authoritative: Decision projection is explanatory only and cannot override the Decision API; release, routing, trust, risk, benchmark, policy, citation, evidence, and trace truth remain authoritative from the final packet.

coherent_governance_loading.interpretation: Governance channel is not coherently loaded enough for autonomous release; review or additional evidence remains required.

semantic_projection_summary.read_only_policy: Semantic projection is explanatory and does not override or mutate the authoritative Decision API outcome.

no_bind_summary.no_bind_reason: Controlled batch artifact does not perform downstream commits; inspect per-case no-bind status.
limitations: Aggregate no-bind is a controlled-corridor artifact summary, not production endpoint proof.

customer_input_checklist.note: OntoGuard does not invent dollar ROI without customer assumptions or pilot baseline data.
customer_input_checklist.title: To calculate your ROI, provide these customer baseline inputs.

roi_kpi_summary.disclaimer: OntoGuard does not estimate dollar ROI unless customer workflow, cost, loss, or working-capital assumptions are supplied.

training_signal_summary.batch_training_signal_summary: Aggregate training-signal export is a review-gated candidate only; no live training occurs.
training_signal_summary.runtime_mutation_policy: review-gated export only; no live model-weight mutation or runtime fine-tuning.

public_limitations: This public kit demonstrates controlled event-level/no-bind proof and controlled batch aggregation, not production L5 non-bypassability.
The governed outputs were intentionally withheld or summarized for review; this is not an autonomous release success claim.
Batch DAP is a controlled-corridor aggregate artifact; production endpoint enforcement requires pilot integration.
Semantic projection is explanatory and does not override the Decision API.
Hard-dollar ROI is not calculated unless buyer baseline assumptions are provided.

what_this_proves: A governed AI output attempted to move toward an output-release route.
Release conditions failed, so autonomous output release was refused.
A no-bind receipt was generated and hash-bound.
The current public maturity label is L1+ event-governed no-bind proof, not production L5 non-bypassability.
Batch DAP / Controlled Corridor Mode is available as aggregate proof across multiple governed cases.

what_this_proves: OntoGuard preserves the authoritative Decision API result while adding a semantic explanation layer.
Semantic projection explains candidate states without mutating release status, routing, evidence, risk, policy, trace, or trust.
Coherent Governance Loading explains whether evidence, policy, benchmark, risk, uncertainty, trace, and trust are aligned enough for release.
Observer views reorganize the same canonical packet for executive, reviewer, and technical audiences.
Batch DAP summarizes aggregate projection posture while preserving per-case depth in full_audit.
